rulings.Case Title: JAMES CHARLES VS. DAVID LEVY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To Enforce Settlement
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday February 26, 2016, line 1. PLAINTIFF JAMES CHARLES Notice Of Plaintiffs Motion To Enforce Settlement OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and Court's January 20, 2016 minute order. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MARK A. MENDAROS VS. FIRST ALLIED FUNDING ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday February 26, 2016, line 2. DEFENDANT DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, re-noticed for April 22, 2016. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CICELY HANSEN VS. GEORGE DAVID MCSPADDEN ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday February 26, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT GEORGE MCSPADDEN DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED in part and OVERRULED in part. Demurer is sustained with leave to amend as to the elder abuse cause of action for Plaintiff to indicate what type of elder abuse is asserted (e.g. physical, financial) and to plead facts to each element of this cause of action. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Complaint is not uncertain and causes of action are sufficiently alleged and are not duplicative. As to the unjust enrichment cause of action, the demurrer is overruled per Hirsch v. Bank of America (2003) 107 Cal.App.4th 708. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CICELY HANSEN VS. GEORGE DAVID MCSPADDEN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday February 26, 2016, line 3. DEFENDANT GEORGE MCSPADDEN Notice Of Motion To Strike Portions Of Complaint DENIED. Complaint sufficiently alleges facts re: reckless disregard of Plaintiff's rights. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion Of Plaintiffs To Compel Defendant Amy Kees Discovery Responses And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant Kee And Her Attorney Of Record

rulings.Case Title: EVELYN LEE ET AL VS. KATHRYN E. VELISEK ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions; Memo Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Counsel
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday February 26, 2016, line 6. PLAINTIFF EVELYN LEE, YVONNE LEE Notice Of Motion And Motion For Terminating Sanctions; Memo Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Counsel GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant's answer is stricken and Plaintiff may obtain a default/default judgment forthwith. Sanctions granted in the amount of $1,080. = (501/REQ)
